name: Constellium SE
description: Constellium SE is a global leader in the design and manufacture of high-value-added aluminum products and solutions. The company primarily serves the aerospace, automotive, and packaging markets, operating manufacturing plants in North America, Europe, and Asia. Constellium designs and manufactures advanced alloys and engineered solutions, including aerospace plates, automotive body sheets, and aluminum beverage can stock, focusing on sustainability and recycling.
